name: Tropical Quesadillas
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium-size ripe banana, thinly sliced into 32 slices
2 tbsp Canned chopped green chile peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the banana and lime juice in a bowl and toss gently.
2. Place one tortilla in a non-stick skillet over medium heat until hot.
3. Arrange 8 banana slices on half of the tortilla, then top with 1½ teaspoons green chile peppers and 2 tablespoons cheese.
4. Fold the unfilled half of the tortilla over the banana-topped side.
5. Cook for 30 seconds, then turn the tortilla over and cook for another 30 seconds or until crisp.
6. Repeat steps 2-5 with the remaining tortillas.
7. Cut each tortilla into 4 wedges and serve warm. Yield: 16 appetizers (approximately 57 calories each).
